SEARCH
Package user

Class RegisteredClient

java.lang.Object
user.User
user.RegisteredClient
public class RegisteredClient extends User
It implements the registered client
Version:
2.0
Author:
Duna P.R.

  • Constructor Details

    • RegisteredClient

      public RegisteredClient(UserType type, String pwd, String userName, String actualID, boolean asc, LocalDate registerDate, String dni, Cart c, ExchangeHistory exchangeHistory, Wallet wallet, OrderHistory orderHistory, OfferHistory offerHistory, NotificationHistory notificationHistory, Searcher searcher, int numOrders, int numExchanges)
      Creates a new registered client
      Parameters:
      type - the type of user
      pwd - the password of the client
      userName - the user's nickname
      actualID - the client's id
      asc - if the search has ascending order
      registerDate - the date of registration
      dni - the user's dni
      c - the user's cart
      exchangeHistory - the user's exchange history
      wallet - the user's wallet
      orderHistory - the user's order history
      offerHistory - the user's offer history
      notificationHistory - the user's notification history
      searcher - the user's searcher
      numOrders - the user's number of orders
      numExchanges - the user's number of exchanges

    • RegisteredClient

      public RegisteredClient(String userName, LocalDate registerDate, String dni, String password, boolean asc)
      Creates a new RegisteredClient
      Parameters:
      userName - the user's name
      registerDate - the registration date
      dni - the user's dni
      password - the user's password
      asc - the products' order in the search

    • RegisteredClient

      public RegisteredClient(String userName, String dni, String password, boolean asc)
      Creates a new RegisteredCliente with a set registration date(today)
      Parameters:
      userName - the user's name
      dni - the user's dni
      password - the user's password
      asc - the products' order in the search
